rules.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-black tracking-tighter uppercase
rules.overline: text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-orange-600 font-mono
rules.general: No 'Inter' or generic sans for headings. Use heavy weights for impact.

rules.contrast: Text must meet WCAG AA 4.5:1. Never use pure #000000, use #0A0A0A.
rules.hover: Always explicitly set text color on hover. Primary brand color for CTAs only.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous spacing. Strict grid hierarchy. Structural and engineered.

grid_bento.dashboard: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 or gap-6. Every pixel utilized. h-full on children.
grid_bento.catalog: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-8. Tetris style layout.

spacing_and_layout.borders: Containers with borders must have internal padding (p-6 or p-8). Use border-collapse for grid tables.
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Optical alignment over geometrical. Left-align dense content. Left-align lists and forms.

surface_styles.cards: Flat background (bg-white), 1px subtle border (border-neutral-200), rounded-sm (max 2px radius). No soft shadows.
surface_styles.dashboard_cards: Use 'Grid Borders' look. border-r border-b border-border/40. Functional, raw data look.
surface_styles.buttons: Flat solid surfaces. Sharp corners (rounded-none or rounded-sm). High contrast.
surface_styles.headers: Solid background (bg-white/95) with hard bottom border (border-b border-neutral-200) and backdrop-blur-sm. z-50.
surface_styles.footers: Dark background (bg-neutral-900) to contrast with light body. Massive space (py-20).

animations.hover: Slight lift (-translate-y-1), crisp shadow (shadow-[4px_4px_0px_#0A0A0A]), border color darkens.

components.strategy: Shadcn heavily customized for 'Swiss Brutalist' look. Strip soft radiuses, add sharp borders.
components.buttons: Primary: bg-orange-600 text-white hover:bg-orange-700. Secondary: bg-neutral-100 text-neutral-900 border border-neutral-200 hover:bg-neutral-200.
components.inputs: Shadcn input with rounded-sm, focus:ring-orange-500, border-neutral-300.
components.badges: Square corners. e.g., 'First Responder' -> bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-800 border border-yellow-300 rounded-sm.
components.icons: Phosphor Icons (@phosphor-icons/react) - Regular or Bold weight for industrial feel.
components.testing: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes.

hero_background.description: Abstract architectural blueprint grid with structural steel scaffolding elements.

product_clamp.description: 3D rendering of a premium steel scaffolding clamp and steel pipe.

scaffolding_site_1.description: Grayscale photo of metal frame scaffolding, good for texture or background.

industrial_machinery.description: Industrial pipes and valves for product catalog examples.

rusty_pipes.description: Rusty industrial structure for secondary visual assets.

supplier_1.description: Construction worker portrait, white hard hat.

supplier_2.description: Construction worker portrait, red hard hat.

brand_logo.description: Metallic industrial logo suitable for mock supplier brand.

instructions_to_main_agent: Do not use generic Inter font for headings; stick to Cabinet Grotesk or similar bold grotesque fonts.
Implement pure HTML+Tailwind for the Buyer Marketing page, emphasizing heavy typography and structural lines.
Use Shadcn UI for the Supplier and Admin dashboards, but override soft rounded corners with rounded-none or rounded-sm (max 2px).
Replace soft shadows with hard 4px solid black/dark shadows (Neo-brutalist touch) to fit the construction scaffolding theme.
Every interactive element MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case format (e.g., data-testid='submit-rfq-button').
Apply 'Grid Borders' concept in dashboards: visible border lines separating columns and rows to mimic a scaffolding structure.
Make heavy use of JetBrains Mono for metadata like lead IDs, timestamps, and measurements.
Ensure the layout is highly responsive and functional on mobile, using mobile-first tailwind prefixes.
NEVER use placeholder domains (e.g., via.placeholder.com). Strictly use the URLs provided in the media section.
Make the buyer cart-style RFQ submission flow seamless with sticky bottom bars or side summaries.
